page_content:
Prerequisite: SPAN331, SPAN332, SPAN333, SPAN361, SPAN362, or SPAN363; or permission of instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. SPAN408R or SPAN477.

Formerly: SPAN408R.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 865

SPAN478 Special Topics in United States Latino Cultures (3 Credits) Explores special topics in US Latino Cultures, ranging from Chicano, Nuyorican, Cuban-American, Dominican, Central-American and other border cultural identities.
